content.title: Introduction
description: SpatioSynth is a no-code, GeoAI-powered platform developed to streamline marine debris damage assessment post-disaster. It allows rapid AI-based analysis of aerial imagery, grid-based insights, cost estimation, and interactive visualization tools for informed decision-making

rows: Access your account using email and OTP. New users can register with their email ID. Once your account is verified by us you can access the SpatioSynth.
Create and view all projects. Each project can contain multiple workspaces. Click to explore related workspaces.
Create and view all workspaces within a project. Clicking opens the Map Dashboard.
Create and view AOIs. Edit or reuse them across different workspaces.

Guided setup for creating custom object detection models by uploading training data, annotating images, and setting parameters. Also shows user-created models with their training or annotation status, and allows uploading additional images or editing annotations for further training.
Lists all uploaded raster and vector datasets. Add new datasets for use in workspaces or models.
Create, view, and manage map annotations. Users can annotate raster and vector datasets with objects of interest using both manual and AI-assisted tools.
The main interface for running analytics, applying AI models, visualizing results, and collaborating.
View charts, graphs, and attribute tables for deeper spatial analysis and data insights.
